title: YouTube Fix for Yandex
confirmReset: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to default?
mainDesc: Display and navigation options for all browsers
hideChipsDesc: Hides the filter bar on the home page and category sections (chips are always preserved on channel pages)
compactModeDesc: Reduces spacing between videos for denser layout
hideTopicShelvesDesc: Removes topic video shelves ("More topics") from the home page
hideRFSlowWarningDesc: Removes notification about possible slowdowns in Russia
fixChannelCard: Fix channel card on channel tabs
fixChannelCardDesc: Fixes the channel card position on all channel tabs
restoreChips: Restore quick filters (chips) on Videos tab
restoreChipsDesc: Ensures chips are always visible on the channel's Videos tab
playlistModeFeatureDesc: Returns playlists to channels (disables yandex browser optimization)
playlistModeWarning: Warning: Playlist page may display incorrectly. Enable 'Playlists on channels' feature in settings to fix.
forceH264Desc: Disables VP9/AV1 codecs to fix video stuttering and freezing
fixAutoPauseDesc: Automatically clicks continue when YouTube pauses video
fixDarkFlashDesc: Prevents white flash during page navigation in dark theme
fixSearchGridDesc: Corrects video grid layout on search results page
fixMiniPlayerDesc: Fixes z-index issues with YouTube mini-player
scrollOptimizationDesc: Reduces scroll stuttering on feed pages
fixSidebarDesc: Fixes sidebar display glitches during navigation
hideEmptyBlocksDesc: Hides empty video placeholders and broken promo blocks on the feed
fixesDesc: General fixes for YouTube issues in all browsers
yandexFixesDesc: Fixes for known issues specific to Yandex Browser
yandexFixNavigationDesc: Fixes back button and page navigation issues in Yandex Browser
yandexFixScrollbarDesc: Fixes double scrollbar and content overflow caused by Yandex optimizations
yandexFixFullscreenDesc: Fixes toolbar artifacts and z-index issues in fullscreen video mode
yandexFixPlayerControlsDesc: Fixes rendering issues with video player controls in Yandex Browser
yandexDesc: Optimize video grid for Yandex Browser
yandexExpDesc: Use with caution, may be unstable
darkModeSupportDesc: Auto switch between light and dark themes
thumbDesc: Change video preview size and aspect
styleDesc: Color palette and style of the settings window
customColorsDesc: Manually adjust individual colors (overrides current scheme)
bgDesc: Set a background image for the settings window or YouTube page
cssDesc: Write custom CSS rules to style YouTube page
warning: Full version available only in Yandex Browser.
playlistModeNotification: Playlists on Channels feature is enabled, browser optimization is disabled!
exitPlaylistModeNotification: Extension will reload in {seconds} seconds to restore functionality
